CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK("https://beisgov.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/TAF2-EXT-OS/Shared%20Documents/5100%20-%20IDM%20(OFF_SEN)/Phase%20Requests/PR%20PROCESS,%20GUIDANCE%20%26%20TEMPLATES/PR%20Assessment%20Matrix%20-%20Live%20Version/Phase%20Request%20Assessment%20Matrix%20-%20Live%20Version%20(V2).xlsx?d=w182b2a07ed074f02ac79ea6c585ba617&csf=1&web=1&e=NUh3Li", "Click here to open the Assessment Matrix spreadsheet" , "_blank")
CustomField.label: Assessment Matrix Link
